name: locale
description: Localization and internationalization primitives. Based on iospharo LocalePlugin.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: locale-language
primitives.description: Get the user's preferred language code (e.g. "en", "fr", "ja"). Output: language code string.

primitives.name: locale-country
primitives.description: Get the user's country code (e.g. "US", "GB", "JP"). Output: country code string.

primitives.name: locale-currency-symbol
primitives.description: Get the local currency symbol (e.g. "$", "\u00a3", "\u00a5"). Output: currency symbol string.

primitives.name: locale-decimal-sep
primitives.description: Get the local decimal separator (e.g. "." or ","). Output: separator string.

primitives.name: locale-thousands-sep
primitives.description: Get the local thousands separator (e.g. "," or "."). Output: separator string.

primitives.name: locale-date-format
primitives.description: Get the local date format pattern (e.g. "MM/dd/yyyy"). Output: format string.

primitives.name: locale-time-format
primitives.description: Get the local time format pattern (e.g. "h:mm a"). Output: format string.

primitives.name: locale-timezone
primitives.description: Get the local timezone name (e.g. "America/New_York"). Output: timezone string.

primitives.name: locale-tz-offset
primitives.description: Get the UTC offset in minutes for the local timezone. Output: integer minutes.

primitives.name: locale-is-dst
primitives.description: Check if daylight saving time is currently active. Output: boolean.

primitives.name: locale-format-number
primitives.description: Format a number using local conventions (thousands separators, decimal). Input: number. Output: formatted string.

primitives.name: locale-format-currency
primitives.description: Format a number as local currency. Input: number. Output: formatted string (e.g. "$1,234.56").
